speaker: Contest Receptionist
introDialogue: Welcome to the Contest Hall!$Trainers from all over are gathering to show off their Pokemon's appeal.
title: Contest Hall
description: A Pokemon Contest is about to begin. Entering will temporarily leave regular battles behind and start a Contest showcase.
query: Would you like to enter the Contest?

1.label: Enter Contest
1.selected: Wonderful! Please make your way backstage.

2.label: Leave
2.selected: You decide to skip the Contest for now.

outro: Thank you for visiting the Contest Hall!
